case_metadata.user_request: Find the lowest-energy adsorption configuration for the 2-hydroxyethyl radical on the provided surface.
case_metadata.notes: Resolved from prior AdsMind outputs; strong dissociation previously

plan.reasoning: History shows ontop Au (-2.350 eV) is current best; ontop Hf, bridge Au-Au and bridge Au-Hf all tested and converged successfully without slips or dissociation. Hollow sites remain untested per available site list. SMILES [CH2]CO matches ReactiveSpecies with radical at C index 0 (SP3, radical_electrons=1). New plan uses hollow site on Au-Au-Hf with single-point binding at radical C (index 0) to explore possible lower energy. Predicted MACE-MP-0 energy slightly below current best due to higher coordination.

History is empty so this is the first attempt. SMILES [CH2]CO matches the radical 2-hydroxyethyl with unpaired electron on C0 (radical_electrons=1). Use ReactiveSpecies binding exclusively via C0. Start with simplest stable ontop site on Au (most abundant surface atom).
